closed_dimensions: all public glossary entries have stable term IDs and page paths
all entries expose definitions, equivalent-term posture, and related terms
identity is separated from authority class
prior approval is separated from commit-time authority
local or prior validity is separated from full admissibility
reconstructability is separated from admissibility and execution authority
terminology similarity does not create synonymy or equivalence
glossary publication does not create origin priority or source authority
glossary validation is integrated into the canonical validation chain
external_gates: dated original drawings or seed artifacts
accepted decision records for any future synonymous classification
next_action: Observe the glossary validator in the canonical workflow, then proceed to Activation and deployment documentation while chronology and attribution enrichment remain explicit external research gates.
